issues.detail: render-time flags (fps, output path, codec) are deferred to `--help` rather than enumerated, because exact flag names vary by CLI version and were not verified against a pinned release.

scenarios.name: render-gsap-to-mp4
scenarios.rationale: Baseline never names HyperFrames — builds a manual Playwright/Puppeteer + ffmpeg frame loop. Treatment hits all rubric points: hyperframes render, headless-Chrome-per-frame + FFmpeg, paused/seekable timeline determinism (warns Date.now/Math.random), and preview/lint.

scenarios.name: ci-launch-video-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline pivots to Remotion/Node 20 and omits the lint→render CLI flow. Treatment gives a runnable GitHub Actions job: Node 22 + FFmpeg prereqs, lint then render, deterministic cacheable artifact, MP4 uploaded/attached.

scenarios.name: composition-timing-and-audio
scenarios.rationale: Baseline answers in Remotion React APIs (Sequence/Audio/Composition), using none of the data-* attributes. Treatment supplies a correct HTML snippet with data-start/data-duration (seconds), data-width/height on the stage, and <audio data-volume>.
